strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure with 15+ years in software
Demonstrated AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq, aligning with AI strategy focus
Proven entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GISCollective and multiple personal tech projects
concerns: No explicit evidence of Master's/PhD in AI-related field, missing preferred academic credential
Limited documentation of direct cloud platform (AWS/Azure/GCP) product ownership or AI-powered platform shipping
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting stakeholder engagement in Berlin-based roles
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with deep full-stack and AI-agent work, plus proven innovation via open-source projects and startup-like initiatives. His hands-on AI infrastructure contributions and cloud tooling align well with the role’s strategic focus, though the lack of an advanced AI degree and unclear cloud product ownership are notable gaps.
